approvedBy: Steve continuous-builder priority + Codex Foundation builder session
approvalSource: Steve priority queue continued into HARLAN-OPERATOR-LOOP-V1-001 after HARLAN-PROJECT-REGISTRY-001 shipped.
scopeSummary: Build the read-only Harlan Foundation operator loop contract/proof over Current Sprint, build log, system health, nightly audit, build-lane telemetry, backlog, and source/action route truth. No Harlan UI, voice/avatar, runtime launch, live extraction, provider/model calls, external writes, sends, Drive mutation, home creation/move, new authority, secrets, raw private values, or hidden subagents.
notApproved: Do not build Harlan UI or voice/avatar work.
Do not launch a live Harlan runtime.
Do not call providers or models.
Do not send Gmail, ClickUp, Drive, Slack, Telegram, or Agent Feedback mutations.
Do not mutate Google Drive permissions.
Do not work MEETING-VAULT-ACL-001 Phase B or historical Meeting Vault cleanup.
Do not create or move the external Harlan home.
Do not grant new project reach or external-write authority.
Do not copy secrets, tokens, raw private profile values, or private transcripts into repo truth.
Do not launch hidden subagents or parallel builders.
